title: Some Float16Array Built-ins Fail to Account for Side Effects Causing Array OOB Access
description_snippet:
VULNERABILITY DETAILS

I will explain what happens in the POC:

In the POC, the `f16Arr.lastIndexOf()` method invokes the `Builtin_TypedArrayPrototypeLastIndexOf()` function for processing. The process is as follows:

1. The `array->GetLength();` method is called to retrieve the length of the `f16Ar
